programme.title: Hell or High Water
programme.desc: With a Texas Ranger (Jeff Bridges) hot on their tail, an ex-convict (Ben Foster) and his brother (Chris Pine) plan a series of heists against the bank that's about to foreclose on their family ranch.

programme.title: Killshot
programme.desc: A veteran assassin (Mickey Rourke) and his young partner (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) pursue a couple (Diane Lane, Thomas Jane) who stumbled upon an extortion scheme and entered the Witness Protection Program.

programme.title: Trainspotting
programme.desc: Eccentric friends and on-and-off heroin addiction mark the life of a young Edinburgh Scot (Ewan McGregor).

programme.title: Pearl
programme.desc: Trapped on an isolated farm, Pearl must tend to her ailing father under the watch of her mother. Lusting for the glamorous life she's seen in movies, Pearl's temptations and repressions collide.

programme.title: Pig
programme.desc: Living alone in the Oregon wilderness, a truffle hunter returns to Portland to find the person who stole his beloved pig.

programme.title: Menace II Society
programme.desc: Crime, street sense and the status quo roil the mind of a teenager (Tyrin Turner) in the Watts section of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Allied
programme.desc: World War II operative Max Vatan (Brad Pitt) falls for French Resistance fighter Marianne Beauséjour (Marion Cotillard) during a deadly mission behind enemy lines. Reunited in London, a devastating secret tests their love and loyalty to each other.

programme.title: Born to Be Blue
programme.desc: In the late 1960s, jazz trumpeter Chet Baker (Ethan Hawke) begins a romance with an actress (Carmen Ejogo) while trying to stage a musical comeback.

programme.title: All the World Is Sleeping
programme.desc: A young mother in New Mexico sinks deeper into addiction while struggling to care for her daughter.

programme.title: American Gigolo
programme.desc: A professional Beverly Hills escort (Richard Gere) falls in love with a big shot's wife (Lauren Hutton) and winds up framed for murder.

programme.title: Becky
programme.desc: Spunky and rebellious Becky tries to reconnect with her father during a weekend getaway at a lakefront house. But the trip soon takes a turn for the worse when convicts on the run, led by the merciless Dominick, suddenly invade the home.

programme.title: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball
programme.desc: In his first year at Kentucky, Tubby Smith becomes the third Black coach ever to win a national title. Florida's back-to-back NCAA crowns mark the rise of a new power. The Lady Vols win 2 straight NCAA titles as LSU reaches 5 straight Final Fours.

programme.title: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball
programme.desc: John Calipari continues the winning tradition at Kentucky with a national championship in 2012. Four years later, Pat Summitt passes away after battling early-onset Alzheimer's disease. Dawn Staley leads South Carolina to a pair of NCAA titles.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Civil War, America's South is looking to put the past behind it, and finds one path in a growing cultural passion of the North - football. In December 1932, the Southeastern Conference is officially formed.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the '50s, including LSU with star running back Billy Cannon in 1958, prior to Cannon's epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss a year later.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: In the 1960s, as Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the Civil Rights Movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region, Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama - and SEC football.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: The 1980s begin with Herschel Walker leading Georgia to a national title as a freshman. After Bear Bryant retires in 1982 and passes away four weeks later, control of the SEC is eventually transferred to Pat Dye and Bo Jackson at Auburn.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: Nick Saban comes to LSU in 2000 and eventually wins the Tigers' first national championship since 1958 - a feat matched by Les Miles. At Florida, Tim Tebow becomes a cult hero and wins two national titles with Urban Meyer's Gators.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An impoverished pawnbroker buys a bottle inhabited by a genie, who offers him four wishes.

programme.title: The Forbidden Kingdom
programme.desc: A teenage fan (Michael Angarano) of Hong Kong cinema finds a Chinese relic and travels back in time to help legendary martial-artists free the Monkey King.

programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A grocery clerk (Martin Short) gets jabbed with a hypodermic holding a miniaturized Air Force pilot (Dennis Quaid) and craft.

programme.title: John Carpenter's Vampires
programme.desc: Vampire killers (James Woods, Daniel Baldwin) pursue a 600-year-old specimen in the American Southwest.

programme.title: Prey for the Devil
programme.desc: Thrust onto the spiritual frontline, a young nun finds herself in a battle for the soul of a girl who's possessed by the same demon that tormented her own mother years earlier.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: While visiting Spartan King Menelaus, Trojan prince Paris falls for Menelaus' wife, Helen and takes her back to Troy. Menelaus' brother, King Agamemnon uses his brother's fury as a pretext to declare war against Troy.

programme.title: Underworld
programme.desc: A female vampire tries to protect a medical student from werewolves intent on creating a hybrid species.

programme.title: Underworld: Evolution
programme.desc: Vampire warrior Selene (Kate Beckinsale) and her werewolf lover (Scott Speedman) trace the origins of the ancient feud between their races.

programme.desc: Lucian (Michael Sheen) and Sonja (Rhona Mitra), his vampire lover, rally the Lycans against their cruel enslavement at the hands of Viktor (Bill Nighy), the vampire king.

programme.desc: Sam resumes an alias and flies to Yemen to find the leader of a terrorist group and rescue a Saudi prince's son.

programme.desc: Dean continues to struggle; Sam must think fast when action figures come to life, and the heroes find themselves living in a real-life horror movie.

programme.desc: After a hunt gone wrong leaves Maggie's whereabouts unknown, Sam and Dean race to find her, but what they find are their own worst nightmares.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: Ante la insistencia del mago Gandalf, el poco pretencioso hobbit Bilbo Bolsón se une a 13 enanos en un peligroso viaje para recuperar el reino de Erebor y gana la posesión del poderoso Anillo Único.

programme.title: Mrs. Doubtfire
programme.desc: Luego de divorciarse, un actor sin trabajo se disfraza de niñera anciana para pasar más tiempo con su familia.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Dos policías de Miami tienen 72 horas para encontrar 100 millones de dólares en heroína robada del almacén de evidencias de su comisaría, pero, para lograrlo, deben intercambiar sus identidades.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Los detectives Mike Lowrey y Marcus Burnett tratan de detener a un narcotraficante que está inundando de éxtasis las calles de Miami y, para lograrlo, cuentan esta vez con la ayuda de alguien muy especial: la hermana de Marcus.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Tres mujeres (Diane Keaton, Queen Latifah, Katie Holmes) idean un plan para robar un dinero destinado a ser destruido por la Reserva Federal.

programme.title: C.B. Strike
programme.desc: Un descubrimiento sorprendente parece confirmar la historia del niño estrangulado, pero el equipo tiene que abandonar la escena antes de poder investigar en profundidad. Como temen que su testigo esté en peligro, el equipo redobla sus esfuerzos.

programme.title: Going to Mars: The Nikki Giovanni Project
programme.desc: La vida de la poetisa Nikki Giovanni y el contexto revolucionario en el que creó su obra, marcado por el Movimiento por los derechos civiles y el Black Lives Matter.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: Basada en la novela de Alice Walker, que detalla 40 años de la vida rural de una mujer de color, en el sur de los EE.UU.

programme.title: Speed
programme.desc: Un oficial de policía debe detener un autobús metropolitano en el que un psicópata colocó una bomba, la cual explotará si el vehículo baja de los 80 kilómetros por hora.

programme.title: Look Into My Eyes
programme.desc: Un grupo de psíquicos neoyorquinos realizan lecturas para sus clientes que revelan un caleidoscopio de soledad, conexión y curación.

programme.title: The Strangers
programme.desc: Tres asaltantes enmascarados aterrorizan a una joven pareja durante una escapada romántica en su remota casa de campo.

programme.title: Anthropoid
programme.desc: In December 1941, two Czech soldiers (Cillian Murphy, Jamie Dornan) parachute into their occupied homeland to assassinate Nazi officer Reinhard Heydrich (Detlef Bothe).

programme.title: Good Neighbours
programme.desc: Victor is new to Montreal and attempts to make friends with the wheelchair-bound Spencer and the cat-loving Louise, but everybody is on edge with a serial killer terrorizing the neighborhood.

programme.title: Results
programme.desc: Personal trainers (Guy Pearce, Cobie Smulders) are charged with whipping a newly wealthy and highly unmotivated slob (Kevin Corrigan) into shape.

programme.title: Results

programme.title: Take This Waltz
programme.desc: A young woman (Michelle Williams) is torn between the husband (Seth Rogen) that she loves and a new man (Luke Kirby) in her life, whom she's unable to ignore.

programme.title: Gloria Bell
programme.desc: A free-spirited divorcee spends her nights on the dance floor, joyfully letting loose at clubs around Los Angeles. She soon finds herself thrust into an unexpected new romance, filled with the joys of budding love and the complications of dating.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: A young swordsman (Logan Lerman) joins three of France's finest warriors in a quest to foil a plot against the crown.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: Hired to kill a man and his daughter (Kirsten Prout), an assassin (Jennifer Garner) instead protects them while battling formidable adversaries.

programme.desc: An irresponsible playboy (Russell Brand) must choose between an arranged marriage that will ensure his future wealth or following his heart with a woman (Greta Gerwig) he truly loves.

programme.title: I, Tonya

programme.title: Don Jon
programme.desc: A New Jersey bartender (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) embarks on his first genuine relationship with a woman (Scarlett Johansson), but his constant craving for Internet porn threatens to bring things crashing down.

programme.desc: A portrait of this generation's youth living on the edge, the film follows Star (Sasha Lane), a free-spirited, teenage rebel who hits the road with a group of hard-partying, fellow misfits and discovers adventure, hope and first love.

programme.title: Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: A defiant mortal (Brenton Thwaites) forms an unlikely alliance with the powerful god Horus (Nikolaj Coster-Waldau) to save the world from Set (Gerard Butler), the merciless god of darkness.

programme.title: The Assistant
programme.desc: Digital assistants are programmed to help people. However, when one such bot goes rogue, it ends up becoming a nightmare for its owner, who is stepping into new beginnings.

programme.desc: As the machines prepare for a final attack, John Connor (Christian Bale) and a mysterious stranger (Sam Worthington) delve into the heart of Skynet and uncover a terrible secret involving the annihilation of mankind.

programme.title: Kate & Leopold
programme.desc: A Manhattan woman (Meg Ryan) falls in love with the 19th-century Duke of Albany (Hugh Jackman) who has stepped through a time portal.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: The unusual genetic makeup of a librarian (Eric Bana) causes him to travel back and forth through time, so that he and his beloved (Rachel McAdams) are always out of sync.

programme.desc: A working-class single mother (Jennifer Lawrence) builds a business dynasty while dealing with her dysfunctional parents and ex-husband (Edgar Ramírez).

programme.desc: A young man (Miles Teller) and his girlfriend (Anna Kendrick) struggle to find desirable employment after graduating from college.

programme.desc: While vacationing on a Sicilian island with her boyfriend (Matthias Schoenaerts), a rock star (Tilda Swinton) receives an unexpected visit from an old flame (Ralph Fiennes) and his seductive daughter (Dakota Johnson).

programme.title: Pawn Shop Chronicles
programme.desc: An Elvis impersonator, meth-addicted white supremacists, and a man searching for his wife hunt for a missing wedding ring.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While visiting the Cherokee, Ian encounters a man from his past who dredges up painful memories of his time with the Mohawk; Jamie meets an Indian agent who challenges his convictions, causing him to reevaluate.

programme.desc: Six people unwittingly find themselves locked in another series of escape rooms, slowly uncovering what they have in common to survive -- and discovering they've all played the game before.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie's authority is tested when an old rival from Ardsmuir shows up to settle on the Ridge; Claire finds a new way to cope with the trauma of her assault by Lionel Brown.
